prompt_text: Best business intelligence platforms for build KPI dashboards connected to multiple data sources
response:
The **best business intelligence platforms** for building KPI dashboards connected to **multiple data sources** are **Microsoft Power BI**, **Tableau**, **Domo**, **Databox**, **Geckoboard**, **ThoughtSpot**, and **MicroStrategy**. These tools are repeatedly highlighted for multi-source connectivity, dashboarding, and KPI tracking across the sources you provided.[1][2][3][4]

| Platform | Best for | Multi-source connectivity | Notes |
|---|---|---:|---|
| **Power BI** | General-purpose BI and KPI dashboards | Strong | Microsoft describes it as a platform to build KPI dashboards and unified views of company health, and Atlassian notes its broad BI capabilities.[4][7] |
| **Tableau** | Advanced analytics and flexible visual exploration | Strong | Atlassian notes Tableau can join data from multiple databases and is powerful for analysts and developers.[3] |
| **Domo** | Enterprise dashboards and self-service analytics | Strong | ThoughtSpot says Domo combines data from various sources and supports both self-service analytics and embedded use cases.[2] |
| **Databox** | Fast KPI dashboards for business teams | Strong | Scoro says it pulls metrics from over 100 sources into customizable dashboards.[1] |
| **Geckoboard** | Simple executive/team KPI monitoring | Strong | Scoro says it connects with over 90 data sources and is designed for straightforward KPI tracking.[1] |
| **ThoughtSpot** | Search-driven analytics and KPI reporting | Strong | ThoughtSpot highlights KPI reporting tools and multi-source blending via automation and data prep workflows.[2] |
| **MicroStrategy** | Large-scale enterprise BI | Strong | ThoughtSpot says it connects multiple data sources and supports drill-through analytics and embedding.[2] |

If you want the **best overall choice**, **Power BI** is the safest default for most organizations because it is explicitly positioned for KPI dashboards and unified views from data across the business, with broad BI functionality.[4][7]

If you want the **best by use case**:
- **Power BI**: best general-purpose option for teams already in the Microsoft ecosystem.[4][7]
- **Tableau**: best for deep visual analysis and joining data from multiple databases.[3]
- **Domo**: best for enterprise-scale self-service dashboards across many systems.[2]
- **Databox**: best for quick KPI dashboards pulling from many SaaS sources.[1]
- **Geckoboard**: best for simple, real-time KPI displays for leadership or teams.[1]
- **ThoughtSpot**: best when you want search-based analytics plus dashboarding.[2]
- **MicroStrategy**: best for complex enterprise environments needing governance and embedding.[2]

If you want, I can also give you a **ranked shortlist by company size** or a **comparison focused on price, ease of use, and integrations**.
